info.title: Fluide Pay API
info.description: Digital wallets, transactions, and payment provider integrations (Ecobank, mobile money). Supports async settlement via Kafka. In the API playground, click Authorize and provide Bearer JWT, X-Fluide-Api-Key, and X-Fluide-Client-Id (fluide-developer).

tags.name: App
tags.description: Service root and build metadata. Use for quick connectivity checks.

tags.name: Prometheus
tags.description: Prometheus scrape endpoint in text exposition format. Configure your metrics collector to poll this path on each service.

bearer.description: Access token JWT. Use as Authorization: Bearer <token>. In the API playground, paste the JWT only.

fluideApiKey.name: X-Fluide-Api-Key
fluideApiKey.description: Developer API key (fl_dev_...). Required on every API call with a machine access token.

fluideClientId.name: X-Fluide-Client-Id
fluideClientId.description: First-party client audience. Must match the fluide_client_id claim on the JWT. Use fluide-developer for Connect.

fluideApiSecret.name: X-Fluide-Api-Secret
fluideApiSecret.description: API secret used only during token exchange. Never send on product routes.

message.description: Human-readable outcome message (localized when i18n is configured)

data.description: Response payload when success is true

message.description: Human-readable error message (localized when i18n is configured)

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code for client handling and support

errors.description: Field-level validation errors keyed by property name

from: from must be a valid date

type.description: The type of transfer recipient (e.g., bank_egp, mobile_money_ghs, etc.)

bank.description: The bank details for the recipient.

mobile_money.description: The mobile money details for the recipient.

recipient_id.description: The ID of the saved recipient

sender_id.description: Optional Flutterwave v4 sender entity id

firstName.description: First name of the account holder

middlename.description: Middle name of the account holder

lastName.description: Last name of the account holder

mobileNo.description: Mobile number of the account holder

email.description: email address of the account holder

dateOfBirth.description: Date of birth in date-time format

identityType.description: ID type of the account holder

identityNo.description: ID number of the account holder

idIssueDate.description: ID issue date in date-time format

idExpiryDate.description: ID card expiration date in date-time format

street.description: street address of the account holder

currency.description: The currency code for the payment

amount.description: The amount to be charged in the smallest currency unit (e.g., cents for USD)

currency.description: The currency in which the payment is made (e.g., xaf)

paymentMethodType.description: The type of payment method to be used (e.g., card)

amount.description: Amount in smallest currency unit (e.g. cents)

metadata.description: Opaque metadata to propagate to Stripe objects
Opaque JSON metadata attached to the corridor row
